trans-unit.source: Aspire has detected {0} agentic coding environment(s) to configure. Would you like to configure now?
trans-unit.target: Aspire обнаружил среды агентного написания кода ({0}) для настройки. Хотите настроить сейчас?

trans-unit.source: Copying user secrets for isolated mode...
trans-unit.target: Копирование пользовательских секретов для изолированного режима...
Не удалось запустить панель управления Aspire.

trans-unit.source: Run an Aspire apphost interactively for development
trans-unit.target: Run an Aspire apphost interactively for development

trans-unit.source: Run the apphost in the background and exit after it starts
trans-unit.target: Run the apphost in the background and exit after it starts

trans-unit.source: Stop any running instance of the apphost without prompting
trans-unit.target: Stop any running instance of the apphost without prompting

trans-unit.source: The --format option can only be used together with --detach.
trans-unit.target: Параметр --format можно использовать только вместе с --detach.

trans-unit.source: The health of the resource, eg Healthy
Output format for detached apphost results
trans-unit.target: Output format for detached apphost results

trans-unit.source: Run in isolated mode with randomized ports and isolated user secrets, allowing multiple instances to run simultaneously
trans-unit.target: Run in isolated mode with randomized ports and isolated user secrets, allowing multiple instances to run simultaneously

trans-unit.source: A running instance of this apphost was found and will be stopped. To run multiple isolated instances simultaneously, run from different directories such as git worktree directories.
trans-unit.target: A running instance of this apphost was found and will be stopped. To run multiple isolated instances simultaneously, run from different directories such as git worktree directories.

trans-unit.source: Do not build or restore the project before running
trans-unit.target: Do not build or restore the project before running

trans-unit.source: The --no-build option cannot be used when watch mode is enabled.
trans-unit.target: Параметр --no-build невозможно использовать при включенном режиме наблюдения.

trans-unit.source: Press [bold]CTRL+C[/] to stop the apphost and exit.
trans-unit.target: Нажмите клавиши [bold]CTRL+C[/], чтобы остановить хост приложений и выйти.

trans-unit.source: The path to the Aspire apphost project file
trans-unit.target: The path to the Aspire apphost project file

trans-unit.source: The project could not be run. See logs at {0}
trans-unit.target: Не удалось запустить проект. См. журналы по адресу {0}

trans-unit.source: Whether to start a debug session, if running in an Aspire Terminal
trans-unit.target: Whether to start a debug session, if running in an Aspire Terminal

trans-unit.source: Starting Aspire apphost in the background...
Detected aspire run inside the Aspire extension, starting a debug session in VS Code...
trans-unit.target: Обнаружен запуск Aspire внутри расширения Aspire, начинается сеанс отладки в VS Code...

trans-unit.note: The state of the resource, eg Running

trans-unit.source: Timeout waiting for apphost to start.
trans-unit.target: Timeout waiting for apphost to start.

trans-unit.note: The type of the resource, eg Project

trans-unit.source: Start project resources in watch mode
trans-unit.target: Start project resources in watch mode
